narrative:
Precinct Monroe South East (precinct in Miami County) has 1,089 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.4 percentage points.
